evidence.clean_text: A. All parties shall demonstrate full compliance with these Clauses to the Competent Authority upon request, and the Personal Data Importer shall maintain documents related to the Personal Data processing activities conducted under its supervision, in addition to the records of Personal Data processing activities as stipulated in Article (33) of the Regulation.
